task_completion.description: Verify the agent has navigated to the Procedures Configuration interface in OpenEMR.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing the OpenEMR interface with 'Procedures' or 'Configuration' selected in the menu or visible in the header.

task_completion.description: Verify a new Procedure Order named 'HbA1c' or 'Hemoglobin A1c' has been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The procedure tree or list displays 'HbA1c' or 'Hemoglobin A1c' as an entry.

task_completion.description: Verify the Procedure Code is set to 83036 and Standard Code is set to 4548-4.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The configuration form for the procedure shows '83036' in the Procedure Code field and '4548-4' in the Standard Code field.

task_completion.description: Verify a Result Type (discrete result) has been added to the procedure.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A child item (e.g., 'HbA1c Result') is visible under the main HbA1c procedure in the hierarchy tree.

task_completion.description: Verify the result configuration includes the correct units (%) and reference range (4.0-5.6).
task_completion.visual_evidence: The result configuration details show '%' in the Units field and '4.0-5.6' in the Range field.

integrity.description: Verify the agent is interacting with the OpenEMR web GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser window displaying the OpenEMR application.

integrity.description: Verify data was entered using the provided forms, not via backend console or scripts.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show text being entered into form fields or the form in a filled state.

integrity.description: Verify the configuration was saved without visible error messages.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots do not show red error banners or 'failed to save' notifications.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The correct Procedure Code (CPT) for HbA1c is 83036. The correct Standard Code (LOINC) is 4548-4. The reference range must be 4.0-5.6 and the units must be %.
